name: hud_ui_element_copy_constructor
description: HudUiElement::CopyConstructor clears linkage, installs the common ftable, and copies flags, state, timer, position, blit source, and clip rect from the source element.
known_limits: Binary Ninja reconstruction remains limited because the original compiler copies source->state through a base-pointer optimization that HLIL renders as a synthetic word temporary.

VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?CopyConstructor@HudUiElement@@QAEPAU1@PBU1@@Z at 0x4b40c0 still fails: 80 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, 2 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 92 bytes and the VC object symbol is 96 bytes. The normalized diff shows behavior-equivalent field copies but different source/state/clipRect scheduling and register choice.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows no direct callees; assembly clears next/parent, installs g_HudUiCommon_FTable, copies flags/state/timer/x/y/bltSource/clipRect, and returns self with thiscall cleanup.
The native smoke validates copied scalar fields, copied clip rect, cleared links, ftable identity, and return value.
